strengths: Extensive backend and distributed systems experience, including handling high-throughput microservices.
Strong commitment to engineering craftsmanship, evidenced by advocacy for TDD, CI/CD, and organizing coding dojos.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
concerns: Lacks executive-level engineering leadership experience and a track record of scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers.
Missing deep architectural experience in fintech infrastructure, specifically in real-time credit risk and algorithmic working-capital management.
AI experience appears to be recent and IC-focused rather than architecting production-grade multi-agent systems for high-stakes commercial environments.
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled software craftsman with deep expertise in backend development, distributed systems, and test-driven engineering practices. However, his background consists almost entirely of individual contributor roles (Senior/Staff Engineer). He lacks the required executive leadership experience, track record of scaling engineering organizations, and specific domain expertise in high-stakes fintech infrastructure and production-grade multi-agent AI architecture necessary for this venture-backed CTO position.
